_doc: Brand registry. The render pipeline picks a brand, sets its Brand-collection variable MODE, and passes this config into renderCard as ctx.brand. The 'logo' slot kind swaps each logo instance to the brand's component by id. Logo ids are file-local — if a logo component is recreated, update the id here (or re-run a lookup by name).
_addBrand: 1. In Figma, add a MODE to the Brand variable collection and fill its token column (colors + fonts). The Brand System board on the Foundations page is the easiest place to eyeball it.
2. Add the brand's logo components (publisher / sponsor / show) to the file and record their ids in a new entry below.
3. Run tools/export_tokens.js and commit templates/tokens.json. Render with brandMode set to the new mode name.
Components are not per-brand-hardcoded — they bind to Brand tokens, so a new mode reskins every card automatically.
